text:
Plans that use a coinsurance percentage rather than a co-payment amount will not have a value in this 
field; see instead the corresponding co-payment variable called (GAP_MO_COINS_3M). 

Starting in 2016, CMS changed how they describe pharmacy networks. The mail order pharmacies are 
currently referred to as standard mail order pharmacies. There is no change in the meaning of the 
variable, and the data values are the same over time.
